full_text:
Zhou Shan 周善
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Shan (周善). Took part in the kidnap plot against Liu Shan and Lady Sun but was killed by Zhang Fei. Zhou Shan is a fictional character. Zhou Shan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
